services.title: Engineer Your Competitive Edge
services.subtitle: Scalable AI integration—from workforce transformation to secure, private enterprise infrastructure.

aiBusinessAudit.name: AI Business Audit
aiBusinessAudit.description: Design your AI-powered operations and unlock smarter growth
aiBusinessAudit.headline: Request Your AI Business Audit
aiBusinessAudit.subheadline: Complete the form below to begin your personalized AI audit. Our team will review your current operations and deliver a full strategy blueprint within one business week.
aiBusinessAudit.priceNote: (Per Business / Includes Full Audit & Strategy Blueprint)
features: Full review of your current systems, tools, and workflows
Identification of cost-saving opportunities across marketing & operations
Lead generation and client acquisition optimization strategy
Custom AI digital assistant architecture tailored to your businesses
Workflow design to maximize productivity and reduce manual work
Clear roadmap for implementing AI without disrupting what's already working
AI readiness + optimization report (your foundation for future growth)

corporateTraining.name: Corporate AI Training
corporateTraining.description: Build internal AI capability and readiness
corporateTraining.headline: Request Your 5-Day AI Training Engagement
corporateTraining.subheadline: Complete the form below to initiate your structured 5-day AI training intensive. Our team will confirm availability, align on objectives, and provide next steps within one business day.

agentInstallation.name: AI Agent Installation
agentInstallation.headline: Deploy Your Custom AI Agent
agentInstallation.subheadline: Submit your details to begin the installation process. Our team will review your workflow requirements and schedule a consultation to scope deployment and implementation.
agentInstallation.description: Deploy one high-impact autonomous AI system
features: Design and deployment of 1 custom AI agent
Integration with CRM, email, or WhatsApp
Automation of one revenue or cost-saving process

growthEngine.name: AI Growth Engine
growthEngine.headline: Initiate Your AI Growth Architecture
growthEngine.subheadline: Complete the form below to begin your comprehensive AI audit and 12-month transformation roadmap. Our strategy team will contact you to align on scope, objectives, and deployment sequencing.
growthEngine.description: Install a structured AI growth system across the organization
features: Corporate AI Training Package (Up to 30 staff)

enterpriseUpgrade.name: Enterprise AI Upgrade
enterpriseUpgrade.headline: Begin Your Enterprise AI Modernization
enterpriseUpgrade.subheadline: Provide your organization details to initiate your enterprise AI infrastructure upgrade. Our team will coordinate a strategic consultation to define system integrations, multi-agent deployment, and executive alignment.
enterpriseUpgrade.description: Transform infrastructure into AI-enabled enterprise architecture
features: Corporate AI Training Package (Up to 30 staff)
